input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.4.2
            TITLE: two or more separate sensors must be used as tpss. the tpss may share the same supply and

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.4.2: Two or more separate sensors must be used as TPSs. The TPSs may share the same supply and
IC.4.4.2 Two or more separate sensors must be used as TPSs. The TPSs may share the same supply and 
reference lines only if effects of supply and/or reference line voltage offsets can be detected.

final_answer: Two or more separate sensors must be used as TPSs. The TPSs may share the same supply and reference lines only if effects of supply and/or reference line voltage offsets can be detected.
